title: Starlight Retreat Home Renovation — Harrington Park
summary: Broader home renovation in Harrington Park with kitchen-led joinery and integrated cabinetry carried through the main living spaces.
heroAlt: Harrington Park home renovation with kitchen and living-room joinery
overview: The Starlight Retreat project reads as a larger renovation where the joinery had to support the overall finish quality of the home, not sit apart from it. Kitchen cabinetry, storage and adjoining details were planned as part of one renovation direction.

afterImages.alt: Harrington Park kitchen with island and skylight
afterImages.caption: Bright kitchen view from the Harrington Park renovation showing the island joinery, skylight and full-height cabinetry.

afterImages.alt: Harrington Park living room with built-in fireplace joinery
afterImages.caption: Living-room joinery and fireplace wall detail from the Harrington Park renovation.

afterImages.alt: Harrington Park kitchen island and cabinetry detail
afterImages.caption: Another kitchen angle showing the island, storage and integrated appliance runs.

afterImages.alt: Harrington Park bar and fireplace cabinetry detail
afterImages.caption: Built-in bar and fireplace cabinetry detail from the Harrington Park home renovation.

afterImages.alt: Finished Harrington Park living room joinery
afterImages.caption: Finished living-room view showing how the joinery and renovation details work together.
Another completed kitchen view from Harrington Park with island seating and full-height storage.

beforeImages.caption: The kitchen before the new joinery, island redesign and skylight-led renovation.

beforeImages.alt: Harrington Park living and dining area before renovation
beforeImages.caption: Open-plan living area before the new joinery and renovation works were completed.

beforeImages.alt: Harrington Park kitchen before cabinetry upgrade
beforeImages.caption: Another early view of the Harrington Park kitchen before the fitted joinery package.

beforeImages.alt: Harrington Park room before renovation detailing
beforeImages.caption: Pre-renovation room view before the new built-in joinery and finishes were installed.

spaces.title: Home renovation joinery
spaces.text: Joinery was treated as part of the wider renovation outcome, helping the kitchen and adjoining rooms feel consistent in storage, finish and daily use.

outcome: The result feels cohesive rather than pieced together, with the joinery helping the renovated rooms read cleaner, brighter and more resolved from one space to the next.
ctaText: If you are planning a renovation in Harrington Park and want the joinery scope handled properly from the start, send through your brief and we can map out the next step.
